titleStmt.title: SII 29.37: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 37. (A.R. No. B. 614 of 1961-62.) RAICHUR, RAICHUR TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in the temple of Rāmalinga.

This is a broken and damaged inscription in characters of about the 11th century A.D. It contains a eulogistic account of a feudatory ruler by name Handa and his predecessors such as Lōkabhūpa, Panda, Chanda, Aṇṇaladēva, Bhima, Handiga, Bijja etc.

The date and grant portion are lost. At the beginning the inscription speaks of the rule of a king who is described as Chakravarti Śri-Rāya-Nārāyaṇa but his name is either not given or lost. Though of the Kalyāṇa Chālukya period the record contains no royal epithets of that family.
Chālukya king Sōmēśvara I [1043-1068 A.D.] had the title Raja Nārāyaṇa, perhaps Rāya Nārāyaṇa may be the same as Rāja Nārāyaṇa, on this basis the king can be identified with Sōmēśvara I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁ nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samasta suranarō maribemaṁja (li) raṁjita cāru caraṇā
naṁbu baudada pramukha nikhiḷa munēnivaha na nindī rāmanaḥ sarōjanirāha haṁsananaṁ bhuvanādhīśvaraṁ śrī
llabhaṁ suraprakara cakravarti śrīrāyanārāyaṇaṁ gabhīra kṣīra vārāśiyoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ
(kamiṁ) paripāḷisuta miṁ tatpāda padmōpa jīvigaḷappa kaṁda . śrī ramaṇī pati vīra śrī ramaṇaṁ beṁṭi
baracaṁdra vairi taru nikara tīkṣakuṭhāraṁ śrī lōka bhūpanāṁ ceṁnegaḻdaṁ . Ātana tanūbhavaṁ .
hu pāṁbaripa carakakṣiti pāḷaṁ karaṁ niraṁtaraṁ tegaḻva mahatvadiṁ surapaṁ naṁpaḷa keyva mahā vibhūti
daranaṁ paḷaṁ baleva śauryaṁ dinaṁbu nidānamaṁ karanaguva gabhīradiṁ deseva permmage tāyvanepaṁda bhūbhujaṁ . Ā
gātanūbhavaṁ . vṛtta . siḍila mārkoṁḍa vīraṁ dinapanesakamaṁ mikka tējaṁ jayaśrī goḍeyāgirddhaṇmu ciṁtāmaṇi
nippārpurāmaṁge sāgdirmmaḍiyāgiddāḷpu kāmaṁgeṇeyenipa lasanmūrti hēmādri goṁduṁ paḍiyāgirddeḷātaṁ
venatesedaṁ dhātriyoḷu caṁda bhūpaṁ . kaṁda . Āvibhuvinanujanaṁṇṇala dēvaṁ marevokkaḍara doḍāṁtaḍa diṭadiṁ kādina kālvāvogu
viditaṁ bhitavaṁ divōri brajamaṁ . vṛtta . Anudinaṁ vāldu baṁṇṇisu mādeyda jagadvaḷayaṁ sarāgadiṁ ghanatara śauryyanaṁ dara
ṁna nūrjita bāhu vīryyanaṁ manusu caritranaṁ vimaḷagātra (ni)nāji jayatriṇētranaṁ manasija rūpanaṁ nuta diḷīpana naṁ
vacūghanaṁ . kaṁda . Ātananujanati vikhyātaṁ bhū harasanari nṛpāḷakakuḷa bhūjata davānaḷanakhiḷa guṇātiśayaṁ nāgaḷdanu
gara bhīmaṁ . vṛtta . madavadvi dviṣṭa bhūpa prabaḷa baḷaghana vrātanātaṁ jaya śrī sadanaṁ bhūhakṣitiśaṁ tolagadiṟida saṁgrāma bhī
padagurḷvaṁ kēḷdu gaḷdāgaḍe sugidugrāri saṁtāna kāṁtāhṛdayakkātaṁkaśaṁ kāvaha mādavāvādiṁnuṁ bhaya bhrāṁtiyeṁdaṁ .
guṇagaṇaṁ gaṇiṁtene . kaṁda . śrī madhuviḷāsadādaviṁ bhūvadhutiṇpiṁ manōjavadhu nija rūpiṁ bādhisi nō ḷpu
gāregadāvagadeṁ baṁdapave . Aṁtavaratanūbhavanari kāṁtā saṁtāna karṇḍa patra bṟuta vikrāṁtaṁ haṁdi
ṇa santatiyaṁ . vṛtta . dinapana tējaviṁdra sutanaṇmiśa nanandana nārghvavāyu naṁdananaḷavaṁga saṁbhavana rūpa marēṁdrana bhōgavarkka
naguṇāṁ nati kūḍa haṁdigāvanipanoḷāppa lōṣṭida naśēṣajagaṁ padapiṁda baṇṇisalu . Āda rādhipatiya sati .
ṁ natiyeṁ saviḷāgū māpasallakṣaṇadiṁ parahita padmaladēvige sariyarssamanāgalārpparē vasumatiyoḷ .
ve pudidaṁ samara mukhāhmādirippa nripati baḷa vibhradi guṇāṁbōdhi vīra bijja nṛpāḷaṁ . Ātana guṇagaṇaṁgaḷeṁtene .
tipa niṟidu geldadu takṣōbha bhūtānadanā rākṣasi saṁkuḷanadi naraṇa kṣōṇiyaṁ nōḍalānātada nāriṁdaṁ
ṁta kaṁpisida nantānakkasa rkkākkarisidaragi dattugrabru tāḷa jaḷaṁ . bagāvaṁdayyaṇa vaṁśadalli gumaṇari bijjabhū
diṁ hityadiṁ satyadiṁ gōgayappanari yeṁdu dāraguṇadiṁ vāgmitvadiṁ satvadiṁ migilāgirddu ma
hānu bhāvana satiya guṇa prabhāvaveṁtene . kaṁda . bhāgada nele vimaḷa yaśōbhāginipariṁ
dāviyana harṇṇiśaṁ baṇṇisuguṁ . vṛtta . bhogada mātadētakenageṁdu nāgaḷtāya kāmakenuvaṁ bhāgaladēvi mecci diḷi kai
tānaśāniṣṭa viśiṣṭa varggamaṁ rāgadināvagaṁ taṇipi tāḷdidaḷudbhu mahatvasatvamaṁ . Aṁta
dēvakiyāgi (be)vasu dēvanāge bijja nṛpāḷaṁ śrīgadhipana vargga vijayādyagaṁ hari mū
tējaṁ kalpa bhūjakke mārppaḍi dānaṁ pavanātmajaṁge tāṇbāhuvīryyavaṁ bādhigiṁ maḍi gaṁbhīra
nādāṁtu baṁṇṇi suvanī śrīhaṁḍa bhūpāḷanaṁ . ghanatējaṁ vīrahaṁdakṣitipati munē Iṁ
ṁ mēṇujaḷaṁ mēṇu tapaṁ mēṇuvana madhyaṁ mēṇunagaṁ mēṇudasegaḷa pesaraṁ mēṇahurakṣa rakṣa sva na
(vā) kāśadoḷu bhūraja vaṟiṁdaṁ haṁda bhūpāḷanāḷapadēvo (ma)da kkama nāvidinā ba
dviṣṭaraṁ duṣṭa vanānu śōbhayaṁ bṛttupagrāridēśaṁ .
daḍāṁ dāṁkrūḷāṭhāvakke
Digital edition of SII 29.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
